title: Changes to the CLI parsing and --help output
body: This patch set modifies the --help output which we generate for various subcommands to not use "value" as the name for the argument for every flag, makes "from" default to --pull behavior, displays default settings for the global options in --help output, and attempts to read required flag values as command line arguments when they're not specified as flags.  There are no incompatible changes in here.

comments.body:
At this point this is such a huge patch, I say lets get it in and then make it easy to make smaller changes in the CLI. 
LGTM
